page_content:
Prerequisite: PSYC680.

Credit Only Granted for. PSYC692 or PSYC721.

Formerly: PSYC721.

PSYC693 Assessment in Counseling Psychology II (3 Credits) Supervised experience in administration, scoring, and interpreting major psychodiagnostic instruments used by counseling psychologists, as well as writing integrative assessment reports. Emphasis on hypothesis testing approach to assessment and on the counseling interview as an assessment tool.
